expanded.socialProof: Trusted by leading Web3 and Web2 companies

howItWorks.title: Frictionless hiring, Zero Risk
howItWorks.subtitle: We combine the speed of Web2 SaaS with the transparency and security of Web3 Smart Contracts.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Talent doesn't upload an empty resume. They pass AI tests and receive an immutable SBT (Soulbound Token) that certifies their real skills.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our algorithm analyzes the company's tech stack and the talent's SBTs to make the perfect match in less than 48 hours. No human bias.
howItWorks.step3Desc: The company deposits funds in a Smart Contract. Talent works securely. Payment is automatically released upon delivery.

engine.title:
The Ultimate
Recruiting Engine
engine.desc: DAO Talent Hub deploys quantum models and predictive LLMs to audit not only GitHub but also contributions on Hugging Face, Kaggle, arXiv papers, and quantum computing architectures. We build an irrefutable on-chain profile of the top 1% global elite talent, eliminating hiring risk.

tokenomics.title: On-Chain Governance and Rewards
tokenomics.subtitle: Talent retains 100% of their value. Investors fund the engine. Everyone wins with $TAL.
tokenomics.card1Desc: Every successfully completed project adds on-chain experience, increasing your SBT level and unlocking premium clients.
tokenomics.card2Desc: Early adopters, validator nodes, and top 1% talent receive periodic airdrops and voting power over DAO fees.

cta.title: It's time to build the future of work.
